_readme: Concord's own SELLING prices (per pair) shown in the Lens Finder next to the Hoya cost. Copy this file to config/cec_prices.json (git-ignored) and fill it in from your price list. A product's CEC price = the first 'prices' entry whose 'match' snippet appears in the brand+name AND whose 'by_index' has the product's index, UNLESS the name contains an 'exclude' snippet (use exclude for photochromic/polarised/tint variants that sell for more than the listed base price). Matching is case-insensitive substring on brand+name; index keys are strings like "1.60". An empty prices list (like this template) shows no CEC prices. Example: "exclude": ["Sensity", "Polarised"], "prices": [{"match": "Dynamic Prime", "by_index": {"1.50": 410, "1.60": 530}}].
